files.name: zbk-button
files.description: A light-DOM element wrapping a real <button>: renders the token-driven skeleton, reflects variants into classes, forwards native semantics, and adds the one behavior a native button lacks (loading).

files.name: zbk-checkbox
files.description: A binary (or mixed-state) choice: a light-DOM element wrapping a real <input type="checkbox"> inside its own label, with an aria-hidden control span visualizing its state.

files.name: zbk-input
files.description: Single-line text entry: a light-DOM element wrapping a real <input> inside its own label, with optional format-as-you-type masking.

files.name: zbk-radio
files.description: One option in a mutually exclusive group: a light-DOM element wrapping a real <input type="radio"> inside its own label. Radios sharing a name form a native group — mutual exclusion, arrow-key navigation, and form submission come from the platform.

files.name: zbk-select
files.description: Pick from a fixed set of options: a light-DOM element wrapping a real <select> inside its own label. Authored option content is adopted into the select; remaining default children are the visible label.

files.name: zbk-textarea
files.description: Multi-line free-form text entry: a light-DOM element wrapping a real <textarea> inside its own label. No affixes, no masking.

files.name: zbk-toggle
files.description: An on/off switch that takes effect immediately: a light-DOM element wrapping a real <input type="checkbox" role="switch"> inside its own label — the APG switch pattern on a fully native input, drawn as a track with a traveling thumb.

files.name: zbk-tooltip
files.description: Supplementary text beside a control: a light-DOM element that adopts its child as the trigger and renders a positioned bubble. mode="hint" (default) describes the trigger on hover/focus per WCAG 1.4.13; mode="toggle" is a click-triggered toggletip announced through the shared live region.

files.name: Layout utilities
files.description: flex, display, positioning, object fitting, overflow, and visibility

files.name: Grid utilities
files.description: grid tracks, placement, alignment, and sizing

files.name: Spacing utilities
files.description: margins, padding, sizes, position offsets, and page or section rhythm

files.name: Typography utilities
files.description: type scales, text behavior, and long-form prose

files.name: Border utilities
files.description: border width, radius, style, and semantic border color

files.name: Effects utilities
files.description: elevation, opacity, stacking order, transitions, and focus rings

files.name: Color utilities
files.description: token-bound ink, canvas, border, fill, and interaction-state color surfaces
